name: HMS ML 465 (ML 465)
events: 15 Sep 1943 HrMs K XV (Lt.Cdr. Baron C.W.T. van Boetzelaer, RNN) shifted from Dundee to Rosyth. She was escorted by HMS ML 465 (T/S.Lt. T.C. Hooper, RNVR).
29 Sep 1943 HMS Unswerving (T/Lt. M.D. Tattersall, RNVR) departed Blyth for Holy Loch. Until Scapa Flow she was escorted by HMS ML 465 (T/S.Lt. T.C. Hooper, RNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
